title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui (formerly ollama-ui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama comparable to ChatGPT; supports multi-user, RAG, and plugins.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI REPL with syntax highlighting, history, and model-switching shortcuts.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS Code extension powered by Ollama models running locally.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama in Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma; includes FastAPI backend and Streamlit frontend.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async APIs, model management, and embedding utilities.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim wrapper for Ollama’s REST API with native async/await and model management helpers.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for LLM-based testing.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to spin up GPU-enabled EC2 instances with Ollama pre-installed and models cached.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to Ollama’s REST and streaming endpoints.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 client library for Ollama with chat, embeddings, and tool-calling support.

title: ollama-rf
summary: Robot Framework library that wraps Ollama for LLM-driven test generation and assertion helpers.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Cross-platform Qt6 desktop GUI for Ollama with conversation history and model download manager.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama as a backend for Claude Desktop and other MCP clients.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models to be used as generators or embedders in pipelines.
